name: Crystal Master
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>先</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Your opponent cannot target "Ultimate Crystal" monsters or "Crystal Beast" cards you control with card effects.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can Tribute this card; add 1 "Ultimate Crystal" monster, "Crystal Beast" monster, or "Crystal" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
pend_eff: Your opponent cannot target "Ultimate Crystal" monsters or "Crystal Beast" cards you control with card effects.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card; add 1 "Ultimate Crystal" monster, "Crystal Beast" monster, or "Crystal" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
eff: You can Tribute this card; add 1 "Ultimate Crystal" monster, "Crystal Beast" monster, or "Crystal" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
